---
title: "Living Labs"
toc: false
---

::: {.living-labs-quote}
We are transofrming the Museums' estates into public-facing ecological observatories.
:::

::: {.living-labs-quote}
We link collections-based science with real-time monitoring, community participation and nature recovery.
:::

::: {.living-labs-quote}
These create spaces where NHM staff and collaborators develop new methods to transform how natural history is observed, analysed and understood.
:::
